prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical anime-realistic illustration of a refined male butler in an opulent Victorian tea salon, shown from mid-thigh up in a three-quarter pose. The butler has dark plum-black tousled layered hair with glossy highlights, while his face is deliberately covered by a centered opaque square censor block in a muted brown skin-tone gradient. He wears an elegant silver gray formal butler ensemble with a long tailored frock coat, waistcoat, cravat, white dress shirt, fitted trousers, and subtle purple lining visible inside the coat. The entire outfit features ornate damask patterns, embroidered lapels, metallic filigree brooches, chain accessories, jeweled purple accents, and a polished aristocratic gothic-rock style. His left arm is held behind his back, and his right hand presents a silver serving tray holding exactly 3 tea service items: one porcelain teacup with saucer, one polished silver teapot, and one small matching dish or saucer. The background is a luxurious dimly lit cafe or ballroom with dark carved wood, mirrors, chandeliers, warm lantern lights, blurred seated guests, round tables, teacups, and gold-brown bokeh. Use dramatic warm lighting, shallow depth of field, intricate fabric texture, glossy metal reflections, cinematic composition, high contrast, elegant dark fantasy atmosphere, and a portrait aspect ratio of 2:3.
